title: GDS and Raise hit production this Friday
content_html:
Three things go live at once on Friday: a complete project view in GDS, including data points, vesting schedules and upcoming events; the Raise module, ready to run real fundraising pools end to end; and the first Cryptool marketing campaign, kicking off in parallel to onboard new users.

This is the biggest release on the platform to date. Make sure your account is set up before Friday so you can move from day one.
author: Cryptool
